node.text:
BX all day.

Keeping it classic with a foundational black and white colorway, the Bronx Girls Skate SB Dunk Low is constructed with a luxe stingray texture pebbled leather and white Swoosh and pulls in color hits from the NYC train lines BXGS use to navigate the city.

The SB Dunk Low by @bronxgirlsskate is available now in select skate shops and January 27 in SNKRS.

Learn more at NikeSB.com.

📸 @pinkyswearxo

node.text:
Behind the Design with @uncouthyouth, @h0lymel, and the @bronxgirlsskate SB Dunk Low.

Full video now playing on NikeSB.com.

Founded in 2020 by Mel Ramirez and Kava Vasquez to give the thriving women’s skate scene at River Avenue Skate Park their gold, @bronxgirlsskate's grassroots approach continues to carve out new spaces throughout New York City.

For their first collaboration with Nike SB, the Bronx Girls Skate Dunk Low reinterprets the iconic colors of NYC transit with an Uptown homage to the Boogie Down.

The SB Dunk Low by Bronx Girls Skate drops January 23 in select skate shops and January 27 in SNKRS.

Learn more at NikeSB.com.

📸 @pinkyswearxo

node.text:
Unfolding across six different locations throughout the city, the 2025 Kitakyushu Block Party turned everyday urban spaces into open skate sessions and shared moments with the local community.

See more on NikeSB.com

北九州小倉の街に点在する6つのロケーション。2025 Block Partyは、日常のアーバンスペースをオープンスケートセッションへと解き放った。

📹 @kamekyo @asu_hole

🎤 Announcement 🔜 Stay tuned to @nardwuar’s channel for details…

#dootdoo

Turning the tables.

Nike SB investigates @nardwuar's broadcast legacy with a signature SB Dunk Low featuring a full-coverage tartan construction that’s a one-to-one match of the iconic hat Nardwuar has worn throughout his decades of journalism.

Releasing December 6 in select skate shops.

Hit the bio link to learn more.

#dootdoo

node.text:
"A Mid Summer” by @taousen_grills 

Featuring @villewester, @ax3lb, @karstenkleppan, @vilmastal, @dylanjaeb, @v.uhh and more.

📼 🔗 in bio

🎤 Doot doola doot doo…Nardwuar’s got a shoe!

We are hitting the road with The Human Serviette in anticipation of the upcoming Nardwuar SB Dunk release and could not be more excited to see all of you.

Stay tuned to @kingswell_losfeliz, @furnaceskate, @adriftshop, @bluetilelounge, @slamcityskates, @route_one, @laborskateshop, @menuskateshop and @nardwuar’s channels for more info soon.

We hope to see 🫵 there!

#dootdoo

🖌️ @mr_ryanduggan

On set with @erickoston, @georgiamrtn, @vtanderson, @bumpysmessage and @_kbunleashed.

SB Air Max 95 and apparel collection by Eric Koston available now in SNKRS and select skate shops.

📷 @t_huff

@erickoston SB Air Max 95 by @neri 

Available now in skate shops. Friday in SNKRS.

node.text:
Frosty’s Motel

SB Air Max 95 by @erickoston out now in skate shops. Friday in SNKRS.

More info at NikeSB.com.

Director & Photographer: @neri
Executive Producers: @tonypillow @simonchasalow @anuaraly
Producer: @taliiweizman

Director of Photography: @dima.shorin

@erickoston’s iteration of an icon. A nod to Frosty’s go-to color choices and signature details, including Eric’s namesake Air Max 95 tongue logo and toe-tip Nike detail in Thai script honoring his heritage.

The Air Max 95 by Eric Koston drops November 1 in select skate shops and November 7 in SNKRS.

Learn more at NikeSB.com.

📷 @t_huff

HAI DEF 💽 An Optimally Amplified Skate through Shanghai

@ishodwair @yutohorigome @chlo_the_flo @prod @nyjah @rayssalealsk8 @shanejoneill 

Full video now playing on @thrashermag 

📹 @anttravis & @19thavenue 

📸 @thefluff
